c.d: Variety of communication methods (e.g., chat, video conferencing, direct messaging).
Features for creating, assigning, and tracking tasks with deadlines and dependencies.
Ability to easily share and manage files within the platform, with version control.
Seamless integration with other business applications like email, calendar, and CRM systems.
Allows modification of interface and functionalities to fit specific workflows.
Enable team members to communicate, share files, and work together in real-time.
Refers to how user-friendly and intuitive the software is.
